2605.27044.title: BatteryMFormer: Multi-level Learning for Battery Degradation Trajectory Forecasting
2605.27044.paper_summary: Early battery degradation trajectory forecasting (BDTF), which predicts the full-life state-of-health trajectory from early operational data, is critical for battery optimization, manufacturing, and deployment. Battery degradation data exhibit two key characteristics. First, degradation data present a multi-level structure, including regularities shared within aging conditions and trajectory patterns shared across batteries. Second, degradation-related variations in voltage-current profiles are often localized to specific state-of-charge (SOC) intervals. Existing approaches often fail to explicitly model these characteristics. To bridge this gap, we propose BatteryMFormer, a multi-level Transformer for early BDTF. BatteryMFormer integrates (1) an aging-condition-aware decoder that injects aging-condition priors via aging-condition-informed queries and aging-condition-aware attention, (2) a meta degradation pattern memory that learns and retrieves trajectory prototypes to guide long-horizon forecasting, and (3) a dual-view encoder that jointly captures temporal dynamics and SOC-localized variations from voltage and current time series. Extensive experiments on four battery domains show that BatteryMFormer consistently outperforms state-of-the-art baselines, marking a significant step toward reliable BDTF. Our code is available at https://github.com/Ruifeng-Tan/BatteryMFormer.
2605.27044.paper_summary_zh: 早期電池劣化軌跡預測 (BDTF)，即從早期運行數據預測全壽命健康狀態軌跡，對於電池優化、製造和部署至關重要。電池劣化數據展現出兩個關鍵特徵。首先，劣化數據呈現多層次結構，包括在老化條件下共享的規律性和跨電池共享的軌跡模式。其次，與劣化相關的電壓-電流特徵變化通常局限於特定的充電狀態 (SOC) 區間。現有的方法常常無法明確建模這些特徵。為了填補這一空白，我們提出了 BatteryMFormer，一種用於早期 BDTF 的多層次 Transformer。BatteryMFormer 整合了 (1) 一個考慮老化條件的解碼器，通過老化條件知識的查詢和老化條件感知的注意力注入老化條件先驗，(2) 一個元劣化模式記憶，學習和檢索軌跡原型以指導長期預測，以及 (3) 一個雙視圖編碼器，從電壓和電流時間序列中共同捕捉時間動態和 SOC 局部變化。在四個電池領域的廣泛實驗表明，BatteryMFormer 始終超越最先進的基準，標誌著朝著可靠 BDTF 迈出重要一步。我們的代碼可在 https://github.com/Ruifeng-Tan/BatteryMFormer 獲得。
2605.27044.author: Ruifeng Tan et.al.
2605.27044.authors: Ruifeng Tan, Jintao Dong, Weixiang Hong, Jia Li, Jiaqiang Huang, Tong-Yi Zhang
